title: Section 24
content: The mediation proceedings under this Act shall be deemed to terminate--- (a) on the date of signing and authentication of the mediated settlement agreement; or (b) on the date of the written declaration of the mediator, after consultation with the parties or otherwise, to the effect that further efforts at mediation are no longer justified; or (c) on the date of the communication by a party or parties in writing, addressed to the mediator and the other parties to the effect that the party wishes to opt out of mediation; (d) on the expiry of time limit under section 18.
